title: UVM DPI libs don't build on macOS 15
body:
Issue as requested in #6792 

The following DPI headers in the bundled UVM libraries don't build on macOS 15 (and presumably later) because they use the deprecated `malloc.h` header, which is not available:

```
test_regress/t/uvm/v2017_1_0/dpi/uvm_dpi.h
test_regress/t/uvm/v2017_1_0/dpi/uvm_hdl_verilator.c
test_regress/t/uvm/v2020_3_1/dpi/uvm_dpi.h
test_regress/t/uvm/v2020_3_1/dpi/uvm_hdl_verilator.c
```

Should be able to use the standard `stdlib.h` instead, or in the worst case something like:

```
#if defined(__APPLE__) && defined(__MACH__)
# include <stdlib.h>
#else
# include <malloc.h>
#endif
```

Edit: actually 2 of those files already include `stdlib.h`, so should be able to just remove the offending include.
